limitation: The IMO table confirms identity, location, and incident consequences but supplies no attacker, weapon, warning, navigation-status, mined-route, or bypass-intent finding; its casualty figures differ from earlier UAE-linked reporting and may reflect later reporting.
observation: The IMO confirmed-incident table identifies AL BAHYAH as IMO 9937799 and MOMBASA B as IMO 9739501, places both 13 nautical miles from Oman on 14 July, and records damage, casualties, no pollution, and abandonment of MOMBASA B.
